text.home.clients.intro:
At Wysiwyg, we design with heart, mind and a bit of madness.
Because when you’re creating something unforgettable, playing it safe isn’t part of the script.
As already successfully implemented by 250+ partners:
text.home.news.heading: In the news
text.home.news.opening:
Creativity isn’t a box to fit into;
it’s a wall to break through.
We chase the spark, ride the chaos
and craft designs
that don’t just
sit there—they shout!
text.home.news.guts:
Design with guts, not just grids.
We listen, we learn, we feel.
Great design isn’t just seen;
it’s experienced.
text.home.news.precision:
We design with precision but we leave
room for the unexpected.
text.home.news.colours:
Colours aren’t curated—they explode.
Palettes are for painters;
we mix shades with attitude.
Bold? Always. Basic? Never.
text.home.news.mainstream:
Design isn’t mainstream.
It’s got character. It grabs attention,
spins it around and leaves a mark.
If you want quiet, you’re in the wrong place.
text.home.news.algorithm:
Trends are cool, but authenticity
is cooler. We don’t follow the
algorithm—we rewrite it.
text.home.news.vibe:
Symmetry is optional.
Vibe is everything.
text.home.news.movedOn:
By the time everyone else catches on,
we’ve already moved on.
text.home.news.real: Real design. Real impact. No filters.
text.home.featured.title: featured Udyatt Luxury
text.home.featured.description: We partnered with Ambuja Neotia to design the brochure for Udyatt, the final masterpiece of legendary architect BV Doshi. Driven by a minimalist visual language, custom iconography and tactile material explorations, the piece beautifully balances art, science and philosophy. It stands as a timeless, breathing tribute to ultra-luxury living.

text.home.accolades.heading: accolades
text.home.accolades.1.description: A unanimous jury decision for the best launch campaign for ‘Utalika—Let this world be yours’.
text.home.accolades.2.description: A compilation by Lisa L Cyr of some of the best brochures in the graphic design industry. It showcases the various textures and patterns in an interesting, tasteful way.
text.home.accolades.3.description: Our exacting standards of copy, design and artwork were applied to create a finished product, month-after-month, that reflects the esteem and prestige of the Rotary Club.
text.home.accolades.4.award: ITC Gold Flake, IFB Home Appliances and Mahadevi Birla World Academy
text.home.accolades.4.description: Kyoorius is a design magazine that publishes an annual compilation of the best design work in India.
text.home.prefooter.copy:
Creativity isn’t clean. It’s messy,
unpredictable and beautifully chaotic.
That’s where the magic happens— and
where the best stories are born.
